selections.name: Royal Toronado
selections.reason: Consistent performer with a strong speed figure of 93. Draws the inside barrier and gets William Pike aboard, making him a major threat.

selections.name: Famous Dain
selections.reason: Dropping in class from LR/BM84+ company. Has the back class and a solid speed figure of 91 to be highly competitive here.

selections.name: Soldanelle
selections.reason: Proven at this level with a recent BM72+ win and a solid 4th in LR company. Speed figure of 87 keeps her in the mix.

selections.name: Asif
selections.reason: Consistent form with a recent win and a close second in this grade. Speed figure of 88 makes him a reliable exotic inclusion.

danger_horse.name: Soldanelle
danger_horse.reason: Classy mare who can easily bounce back to winning form if the pace suits.

selections.name: Castle Road
selections.reason: Boasts the highest speed figure (90) in this sprint field. Has good class lines and should be prominent throughout.

selections.name: Keep Reading
selections.reason: Speed figure of 87 and gets a crucial barrier 1 advantage for this short sprint, offsetting the weight penalty.

selections.name: Snow Prince
selections.reason: Coming off a win and draws well in barrier 3. Speed figure of 83 puts him right in the finish.

selections.name: Tycoon Harry
selections.reason: Recent winner with a strong speed figure of 87. Must carry weight but has the ability to overcome it.

danger_horse.name: Keep Reading
danger_horse.reason: The inside draw over 5f is a massive advantage that could see him dictate terms.

selections.name: Lucky I Am
selections.reason: Very consistent form profile and draws perfectly in barrier 3. Speed figure of 82 is strong for this grade.

selections.name: Masamune
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the race (85). If he can replicate his best form, he will be very hard to hold out.

selections.name: Earth God
selections.reason: Consistent placegetter with a solid speed figure of 80. Should be in the finish again.

selections.name: Urquharts Bluff
selections.reason: Recent winner with a good speed figure of 76. Draws well and can feature in the multiples.

danger_horse.name: So Si God
danger_horse.reason: Gets a weight bonus and a great draw. Progressive type who could surprise.

selections.name: Wonderfully Made
selections.reason: Dominant LR winner last start with a standout speed figure of 91. Clearly the one to beat despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Masmelo
selections.reason: Runner-up to the top pick last start. Speed figure of 86 and gets the inside run to save ground over the staying trip.

selections.name: Admire Astra
selections.reason: Finished 3rd in the same LR race. Speed figure of 84 keeps her firmly in the mix for the placings.

selections.name: Chino Bay
selections.reason: Recent winner stepping up in class. Speed figure of 76 suggests she can fill the back end of exotics.

danger_horse.name: Masmelo
danger_horse.reason: The inside draw over this distance gives her a tactical advantage to potentially turn the tables.

selections.name: Firearm
selections.reason: Has race experience and placed in a 2yo SWP. Pike takes the ride, which is a strong positive indicator.

selections.name: London Rose
selections.reason: Placed twice in similar company and draws well in barrier 4. Race experience is key here.

selections.name: Happy Dance
selections.reason: First starter who won a recent trial. Profiles well to run a bold race on debut.

selections.name: Crypto Master
selections.reason: First starter who placed in a trial and gets a great inside draw.

danger_horse.name: London Rose
danger_horse.reason: Has the experience and the draw to dictate terms against the debutants.

selections.name: Later Alligator
selections.reason: Consistent form profile with a solid speed figure of 79. Draws perfectly in barrier 3 to get an ideal transit.

selections.name: Noble Connection
selections.reason: Highest speed figure in the race (83). Must overcome the weight penalty but has the raw ability to feature.

selections.name: Spank Appeal
selections.reason: Recent winner with a competitive speed figure of 76. Can overcome the wider draw to be in the finish.

selections.name: Success Play
selections.reason: Speed figure of 77 and draws well. Capable of running into the placings on his best form.

danger_horse.name: Noble Connection
danger_horse.reason: Class runner of the field who can win if he handles the weight.

selections.name: Touretto
selections.reason: Recent winner with a strong speed figure of 83. Draws ideally in barrier 3 and looks well placed to repeat.

selections.name: Late Arrival
selections.reason: Consistent form and a solid speed figure of 79. Gets a great run from barrier 2.

selections.name: The Jester's Son
selections.reason: Speed figure of 79 and has been racing well. Weight penalty is a slight concern but has the class.

selections.name: Guns Away
selections.reason: Speed figure of 79 puts him right in this. Draws well and can add value to the exotics.

danger_horse.name: Late Arrival
danger_horse.reason: Drawn to get the run of the race and has the figures to upset the top pick.

selections.name: Influencing
selections.reason: Strong speed figure of 92 and comes off a win. Looks perfectly placed to continue his good form.

selections.name: Madame Magic
selections.reason: Speed figure of 91 and gets a positive barrier draw. Major threat to the top selection.

selections.name: Timeless Gem
selections.reason: Speed figure of 88 and draws beautifully in barrier 2. Consistent type who will be in the finish.

selections.name: Siberian Siren
selections.reason: Speed figure of 90 and draws well. Must carry the weight penalty but has the class to overcome it.

danger_horse.name: Madame Magic
danger_horse.reason: Excellent figures and a great draw make her a legitimate winning chance.

selections.name: The Crimson Pirate
selections.reason: Dominant LR winner last start with an elite speed figure of 94. The clear standout despite the wide draw.

selections.name: Aberdeen Flyer
selections.reason: Runner-up to the top pick last start. Speed figure of 90 makes him the logical main danger.

selections.name: Dominatus
selections.reason: Speed figure of 90 and draws very well. Has the class to be highly competitive in this field.

selections.name: Linchpin
selections.reason: Recent winner with a solid speed figure of 88. Can fill the exotics from a good draw.

danger_horse.name: Aberdeen Flyer
danger_horse.reason: Has the figures to challenge if the top pick has any issues from the wide gate.
